metadata.title: Stripe | Financial Infrastructure to Grow Your Revenue
metadata.description: Stripe is a financial services platform that helps all types of businesses accept payments, build flexible billing models, and manage money movement.

scan_results.brand_voice: Professional, supportive, and focused on enabling growth and innovation in financial infrastructure.
scan_results.target_audience: Businesses of all sizes, including startups, enterprises, and Fortune 100 companies.
scan_results.value_proposition: Comprehensive set of payments and financial tools designed to work individually or together, enabling businesses to grow their revenue from their first transaction to their billionth.
scan_results.company_description: Stripe is a financial services platform that helps all types of businesses accept payments, build flexible billing models, and manage money movement.
